RT @OakFoSho: .@laurenriot if people come to a FTP march they need to expect to be on camera at all times, OPD's cams, MSM cams, citizen ...
@bellaeiko @laurenriot @oakfosho I prefer to be in the middle of the action- and I have learned that people are more forthcoming on audio
@BellaEiko @laurenriot @oakfosho On the other hand I have a still camera and an audio recorder- I can take shots of action that obscure face
@BellaEiko @mrejfox @laurenriot @oakfosho That's the point- as a live streamer you are obligated to look + point your camera at the action
@BellaEiko @laurenriot @mrejfox @oakfosho That said I appreciate there are that there's a 'diversity in media tactics'- different priorities
@laurenriot @bellaeiko @mrejfox @oakfosho It's a careful line we walk as independent media- you can tell truth without incriminating imho
@laurenriot @oakfosho @BellaEiko My personal policy is to turn to audio-only recording when pictures of comrades in action could incriminate
